objectives.title: Eliminate Load-Shedding by 2025
objectives.description: Reduce unplanned outages to below 4,000 MW and eliminate load-shedding through accelerated maintenance, Medupi/Kusile completion, and IPP procurement. Aligned with NDP infrastructure goals.

objectives.title: Just Energy Transition - Coal Phase-Out Plan
objectives.description: Develop and implement a Just Energy Transition plan aligned with the JETP partnership commitment of $8.5 billion. Decommission aging coal plants responsibly while protecting affected workers and communities.

objectives.title: Debt Reduction to R300bn by 2026
objectives.description: Utilise the R254 billion government debt relief package to reduce total debt burden and restore financial sustainability. Implement cost-reduction programme and tariff normalisation.

objectives.title: Freight Rail Volume Recovery to 250Mt
objectives.description: Restore freight rail volumes to 250 million tonnes per annum through infrastructure rehabilitation, locomotive procurement, and anti-theft measures. Critical for NDP economic growth targets.

objectives.title: Port Efficiency - Reduce Vessel Waiting Time to 2 Days
objectives.description: Implement Operation Phakisa port efficiency programme to reduce vessel waiting times at Durban and Cape Town ports. Introduce private terminal operators and extend operating hours.

objectives.title: Achieve Operational Profitability by FY2025
objectives.description: Leverage Takatso Consortium partnership to achieve operational profitability. Expand route network, improve load factors, and reduce unit costs through fleet modernisation.

objectives.companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa
objectives.title: Rolling Stock Fleet Renewal - 580 New Train Sets
objectives.description: Complete procurement and deployment of 580 new train sets under the Rolling Stock Fleet Renewal Programme to replace aging Metrorail fleet and restore reliable commuter rail services.

objectives.title: Financial Stabilisation and Business Rescue
objectives.description: Implement government recapitalisation of R3.4 billion, restructure operations, and focus on profitable product lines to restore Denel to financial viability and preserve strategic defence capabilities.

objectives.companyName: South African Broadcasting Corporation SOC Limited
objectives.title: Digital Migration and Platform Modernisation
objectives.description: Complete migration from analogue to digital broadcasting across all platforms. Develop digital-first content strategy and modernise IT infrastructure to remain competitive in the streaming era.

objectives.companyName: Airports Company South Africa SOC Limited
objectives.title: O.R. Tambo Phase 3 Expansion
objectives.description: Complete R8.5 billion Phase 3 expansion of O.R. Tambo International Airport to increase annual passenger capacity from 28 million to 45 million. Supports NDP tourism and trade targets.

kpis.name: Unplanned Capacity Loss Factor (UCLF)
kpis.description: Percentage of generation capacity lost due to unplanned outages

kpis.name: Energy Availability Factor (EAF)
kpis.description: Percentage of total installed capacity available for generation

kpis.name: Renewable Energy Capacity Added (MW)
kpis.description: Megawatts of renewable energy capacity procured from IPPs under REIPPPP

kpis.name: Total Debt (R billion)
kpis.description: Total outstanding debt including government-guaranteed debt

kpis.name: Freight Rail Volumes (Mt per annum)
kpis.description: Total freight volumes transported by rail in million tonnes

kpis.name: Average Vessel Waiting Time (Days)
kpis.description: Average number of days vessels wait at Durban port before berthing

kpis.name: Passenger Load Factor
kpis.description: Percentage of available seats filled by paying passengers

kpis.companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa
kpis.name: Train Service Reliability Rate
kpis.description: Percentage of scheduled train services that operate on time

kpis.companyName: South African Broadcasting Corporation SOC Limited
kpis.name: Digital Platform Monthly Active Users
kpis.description: Number of monthly active users on SABC digital platforms

kpis.companyName: Airports Company South Africa SOC Limited
kpis.name: Annual Passenger Throughput
kpis.description: Total passengers processed across all ACSA airports
